The term helix refers to the incurved rim of the external ear. 耳輪一詞是指外耳的向內彎曲的邊緣。
Living in such poor conditions must be an absolute hell. 生活在如此惡劣的條件下簡直是地獄。
The movie tells a story about a brave man's descent into hell. 這部電影講述了一個勇敢男人墜入地獄的故事。

meaning: 吵鬧、吵鬧、麻煩的人；惡棍。
sentences: The term heller refers to a noisy, rowdy, troublesome person; a hellion. Heller一詞指的是吵鬧、吵鬧、麻煩的人；一個惡棍。
The lesson introduced heller as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 heller 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 造成巨大的疼痛、不適或痛苦。
sentences: I woke up from a hellish noise coming from the house next door. 我被隔壁房子傳來的地獄般的噪音吵醒了。
The report describes the result as hellish. 報告將結果描述為地獄般的。
He said hello to everyone as he entered the room. 他進入房間時向每個人打了聲招呼。
Hello! How are you doing today? 哈囉！你今天過得怎麼樣？
The captain stood at the helm and guided the ship through the storm. 船長站在舵位，引導船隻穿過暴風雨。
She is now at the helm of the company after the retirement of the CEO. 在執行長退休後，她現在掌管著這家公司。
You should always wear a protective helmet when riding a bike. 騎單車時一定要戴防護頭盔。
The construction workers are required to wear safety helmets. 建築工人被要求戴安全帽。
Is there anything I can do to help you with your project? 有什麼我可以幫你的嗎？
The local charity organization provides help to homeless people. 當地的慈善機構為無家可歸的人提供幫助。

meaning: 一個樂於助人的人；一個助手；助手;輔助。
sentences: The term helper refers to one who helps; an aide; assistant; auxiliary. 「幫助者」一詞指的是提供幫助的人；一名助手；助手;輔助的。
The lesson introduced helper as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了 helper 作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The staff at the hotel were very helpful and polite. 飯店的工作人員非常熱心且有禮貌。
She gave me some very helpful advice on how to save money. 她給了我一些關於如何存錢的非常實用的建議。

meaning: 給予援助或援助的行為。
sentences: She finds great joy in helping people. 她在幫助別人的過程中找到了莫大的快樂。
The term helping refers to The act of giving aid or assistance (to). 幫助一詞是指給予援助或協助的行為。
She asked the tailor to shorten the hem of her skirt. 她請裁縫師把她裙子的褶邊縮短一點。
The curtains were hemmed with white lace. 窗簾邊緣鑲著白色蕾絲。
The Earth is divided into the Northern and Southern Hemispheres by the equator. 地球被赤道分為北半球和南半球。
The weather in the Southern Hemisphere is very different during the summer. 南半球在夏季的天氣非常不同。
Hemophilia is a genetic disorder that affects the blood's ability to clot. 血友病是一種影響血液凝固能力的遺傳性疾病。
Patients with hemophilia need to be very careful to avoid injuries. 血友病患者需要非常小心以避免受傷。

meaning: 體內或體外大量血液釋放。
sentences: We got news that he died of a hemorrhage. 我們得到消息稱他因失血過多而死亡。
The term hemorrhage refers to A heavy release of blood within or from the body. 出血一詞是指體內或體外大量血液釋放。

meaning: 大麻，一種高大的一年生草本植物，原產於亞洲。
sentences: The term hemp refers to a tall annual herb, Cannabis sativa, native to Asia. 大麻一詞指的是一種高大的一年生草本植物大麻，原產於亞洲。
The lesson introduced hemp as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了大麻作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The hen was sitting on her eggs in the warm nest. 母雞正坐在溫暖的巢裡孵蛋。
We get fresh eggs from our hens every morning. 我們每天早上都能從母雞那裡得到新鮮雞蛋。
The weather was very bad, hence the decision to cancel the outdoor event. 天氣非常糟糕，因此決定取消戶外活動。
Ten years hence, the world will be a very different place due to technology. 從現在起十年後，由於科技的發展，世界將會大不相同。

meaning: 從現在開始；從這個時候起。
sentences: I will try to do a better job, henceforth, now that I know the proper technique! 既然我知道了正確的技術，今後我會努力做得更好！
If someone acts henceforth, they do so in a way that is from now on; from this time on. 如果某人從現在開始採取行動，他們就會以從現在開始的方式這樣做；從這個時候開始。
She applied henna to her hair to give it a reddish tint. 她在頭髮上抹了指甲花染料，使其呈現微紅色。
Traditional henna patterns are often drawn on hands during weddings. 傳統的指甲花圖案常在婚禮期間繪製在手上。

meaning: 屬於肝臟的或與肝臟有關的。
sentences: The report describes the result as hepatic. 報告將結果描述為肝臟。
Everyone noticed the hepatic tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的肝氣。
Hepatitis is an inflammation of the liver caused by a virus or toxins. 肝炎是由病毒或毒素引起的肝臟發炎。
The doctor recommended getting vaccinated against hepatitis B. 醫生建議接種 B 型肝炎疫苗。
I saw her at the supermarket yesterday. 我昨天在超市見到她了。
She left her keys on the table. 她把鑰匙留在了桌上。
The blooming of flowers heralds the arrival of spring. 鮮花的盛開預示著春天的到來。
The messenger was sent as a herald to announce the news. 信使被派去作為使者宣佈消息。
She enjoys growing various herbs, such as basil and mint, in her garden. 她喜歡在花園裡種植羅勒和薄荷等各種香草。
Many traditional remedies are made from natural herbs and plant extracts. 許多傳統療法是由天然草藥和植物提取物製成的。
Would you like a cup of herbal tea? 你想喝杯草藥茶嗎？
The store sells various herbal products for health and beauty. 這家店出售各種健康和美容用的草本產品。
A large herd of cattle was peacefully grazing in the meadow now. 一大群牛現在正草地上平靜地吃草。
We saw a huge herd of wild buffaloes grazing in the vast plains. 我們看到一大群野生水牛在廣闊的平原上吃草。
Please wait here until I come back. 請在這裡等我回來。
Here is the book that you were looking for. 這裡就是你一直在找的那本書。

meaning: 透過這種方式，行動或過程。
sentences: I hereby declare you husband and wife. 我特此宣布你們為夫妻。
If someone acts hereby, they do so in a way that is by this means, action or process. 如果某人據此採取行動，他們就是透過這種手段、行動或過程來這樣做的。
The condition is hereditary and runs in his family. 這種情況是遺傳性的，在他家族中代代相傳。
Scientists are studying the hereditary factors of intelligence. 科學家正在研究智力的遺傳因素。

meaning: 在這方面；在該內容、上下文或事物中。
sentences: If someone acts herein, they do so in a way that is in this; within this content, context, or thing. 如果有人在此採取行動，他們就會以這種方式行事；在此內容、上下文或事物中。
The speaker responded herein during the discussion. 發言者在討論中對此作出回應。

meaning: 宗教成員所持有的與既定宗教信仰不一致或衝突的教義。
sentences: The term heresy refers to a doctrine held by a member of a religion at variance or conflict with established religious beliefs. 異端一詞是指宗教成員所持有的與既定宗教信仰不一致或衝突的教義。
The lesson introduced heresy as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了異端作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The historic city center has been declared a World Heritage Site. 歷史悠久的市中心已被宣佈為世界文化遺產。
We must all work together to protect our cultural heritage for future generations. 我們必須共同努力保護我們的文化遺產，留給後代。

meaning: 宗教隱士；因宗教因素獨居的人；隱士。
sentences: The term hermit refers to A religious recluse; someone who lives alone for religious reasons; an eremite. 隱士一詞指的是宗教隱士；因宗教原因獨居的人；隱士。
We learned the meaning of hermit during today's lesson. 今天的課我們學習了隱士的意思。
The brave firefighter was hailed as a local hero. 那位勇敢的消防員被譽為當地的英雄。
Superman is a famous fictional superhero. 超人是一位著名的虛構超級英雄。
The brave soldier was hailed as a national hero after the war. 那位勇敢的士兵戰後被讚譽為國家英雄。
The novel tells the story of a courageous heroine fighting for justice. 這部小說講述了一位為正義而戰的勇敢女主角的故事。
The firefighters were praised for their heroic efforts to rescue the family. 消防員因英勇營救那家人而受到稱讚。
The story follows the heroic journey of a young warrior in a foreign land. 故事講述了一位年輕戰士在異國他鄉的英勇歷程。
Heroin is an extremely addictive and dangerous illegal drug. 海洛因是一種成癮性極強且危險的非法毒品。
The police seized a large amount of heroin during the raid last night. 警方在昨晚的突襲中沒收了大量的海洛因。

meaning: 英雄特有的特質，如勇敢、勇敢、堅韌、無私等；這種特質的展現。
sentences: The term heroism refers to the qualities characteristic of a hero, such as courage, bravery, fortitude, selflessness, etc.; the display of such qualities. 英雄主義是指英雄所特有的特質，如勇敢、勇敢、堅韌、無私等；這種特質的展現。
The lesson introduced heroism as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了英雄主義作為一個有用的術語來理解。

meaning: 鷺科任何長腿、長頸涉水鳥。
sentences: The term heron refers to any long-legged, long-necked wading bird of the family Ardeidae. 蒼鷺一詞是指鷺科的任何長腿、長頸涉水鳥。
The lesson introduced heron as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了蒼鷺這個術語，它是一個值得理解的有用術語。
Smoked herring is a popular breakfast dish in some cultures. 熏鯡魚在某些文化中是受歡迎的早餐。
A shoal of herring was swimming near the surface of the ocean. 一群鯡魚正在海面附近游動。
The red umbrella is mine, and the blue one is hers. 紅傘是我的，藍傘是她的。
I'm sure that book is hers. 我肯定那本書是她的。

She decided to do the project all by herself. 她決定獨自一人完成這個專案。

meaning: 在國際單位制中，頻率的衍生單位；每秒一次（任何週期性事件的週期或週期）。
sentences: The term hertz refers to in the International System of Units, the derived unit of frequency; one (period or cycle of any periodic event) per second. 赫茲一詞在國際單位制中是指頻率的衍生單位；每秒一個（任何週期性事件的週期或週期）。
The lesson introduced hertz as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了赫茲作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 傾向於猶豫、等待或謹慎或保留地進行。
sentences: I am hesitant to recommend him as a manager because he has a short temper. 我很猶豫是否推薦他當經理，因為他脾氣暴躁。
Something described as hesitant is tending to hesitate, wait, or proceed with caution or reservation. 猶豫是指傾向於猶豫、等待或謹慎或保留地進行。
Please don't hesitate to contact me if you have any questions. 如果你有任何問題，請隨時（不要猶豫）與我聯繫。
He hesitated for a moment before answering the difficult question. 在回答那個難題前，他猶豫了一會兒。
She accepted the job offer without a single moment of hesitation. 她毫不（毫無一刻）猶豫地接受了這份工作邀請。
His hesitation managing to cause a lot of delay in the project. 他的猶豫竟然導致了專案的大量延誤。

meaning: 種類或性質多樣；由不同的部分組成。
sentences: He had a large and heterogeneous collection of books. 他藏有大量不同種類的書籍。
The report describes the result as heterogeneous. 該報告將結果描述為異質的。
The study focused on the social behavior of heterosexual couples in the city. 研究聚焦於城市中異性戀夫婦的社會行為。
Most of the people who attended the event identified as heterosexual. 參加此次活動的大多數人自認為是異性戀。

meaning: 一個 多邊形 ，具有 邊和六個角。
sentences: The term hexagon refers to A polygon with six sides and six angles. 術語「六邊形」是指 具有 六個 條邊和六個角度的 <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/wiki/polygongon" title/pw:Wikipolygon。 術語「六邊形」是指具有六個邊和六個角的多邊形。 術語「六邊形」是指具有六個條邊和六個角度的 <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/wiki/polygongon" title/pw:Wikipolygon。
The lesson introduced hexagon as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了六邊形作為一個易於理解的有用術語。 本課介紹了六邊形作為一個易於理解的有用術語。 本課介紹了六邊形作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 具有六個邊，或具有六邊形的橫截面。
sentences: Nuts in engineering are generally hexagonal. 工程上的螺帽一般都是六角形的。
The report describes the result as hexagonal. 報告將結果描述為六邊形。

meaning: 一段成功、受歡迎或權力的時期；質數。
sentences: The early twentieth century was the heyday of the steam locomotive. 二十世紀初是蒸氣機車的鼎盛時期。
The term heyday refers to a period of success, popularity, or power; prime. 全盛時期指的是成功、受歡迎或權力的時期；主要的。
The band decided to go on hiatus, citing creative differences. 樂團以創意差異為由決定繼續停演。
The term hiatus refers to An interruption, break, pause or absence. 術語「間斷」是指中斷、中斷、暫停或缺席。

meaning: 有些動物在冬季處於最低功耗、不活動和代謝抑制的狀態。
sentences: The bears are in hibernation. 熊正在冬眠。
The bears come out of hibernation in March. 三月，熊們從冬眠中醒來。
The garden is filled with beautiful red hibiscus flowers. 花園裡開滿了美麗的紅朱槿花。
Hibiscus tea is a refreshing drink rich in vitamin C. 朱槿花茶是一種富含維生素 C 的清爽飲料。

meaning: 膈肌痙攣，或由此產生的聲音。
sentences: There was a loud hiccup from the back of the room and the class erupted in laughter. 教室後方傳來一陣打嗝聲，全班爆出一陣笑聲。
The term hiccup refers to A spasm of the diaphragm, or the resulting sound. 打嗝一詞是指膈肌痙攣，或由此產生的聲音。

meaning: 交易或行動出現意外的負面結果或損失。
sentences: take a hickey 吻痕
Farmer Jones took a hickey on his soybean crop when the flood washed the seeds away. 當洪水沖走種子時，農民瓊斯在他的大豆作物上留下了吻痕。
The loggers wore hickory shirts. 伐木工人穿著 山核桃木 襯衫。 伐木工人穿著山核桃木襯衫。 伐木工人穿著山核桃木襯衫。

The term hickory refers to A coarse, durable cotton fabric. 山核桃木一詞指的是 粗糙 、 耐用 Ltlecop href="/wiki/fabric" title="fabric">布料 。 術語山核桃木指的是一種粗糙、耐用的棉織物。 山核桃木加工指的是粗糙、耐用的 Ltlecop href="/wiki/fabric" title="fabric">布料。

meaning: 位於或位於視線之外；視覺上不明顯。
sentences: hidden treasure; hidden talents 隱藏的寶藏；隱藏的人才
Something described as hidden is located or positioned out of sight; not visually apparent. 被描述為隱藏的東西位於或放置在視線之外；視覺上不明顯。
The little boy tried to hide behind the curtains. 小男孩試圖躲在窗簾後面。
She couldn't hide her disappointment when she heard the news. 聽到消息時，她掩飾不住內心的失望。

meaning: 一個隱藏的地方，一個人可以去躲避其他人的地方
sentences: This weekend, let's find some romantic hideaway on the coast. 這個週末，讓我們在海岸尋找一些浪漫的世外桃源。
The term hideaway refers to a hiding place, somewhere one can go to get away from other people. hideaway一詞指的是一個隱藏的地方，一個人可以去躲避其他人的地方。

meaning: 極端 或 令人震驚 醜陋 。
sentences: I’m sorry to break it to you, but your dress looks truly hideous. 很抱歉打擾你，但你的衣服看起來真的 難看 。 很抱歉打擾你，但你的衣服看起來真的很難看。 很抱歉打擾你，但你的衣服看起來真的很難看。
The report describes the result as hideous. 報告稱這一結果是可怕的。 報告稱這一結果是可怕的。 報告稱這個結果是可怕的。

meaning: 依各種標準分類或排列成連續的等級或等級。
sentences: It has been said that only a hierarchical society with a leisure class at the top can produce works of art. 有人說，只有有閒階級處​​於頂層的階級社會才能產生藝術品。
Something described as hierarchical is classified or arranged according to various criteria into successive ranks or grades. 被描述為分層的事物根據各種標準被分類或排列成連續的等級或等級。
The company has a very clear hierarchy, from the CEO to the interns. 該公司有著非常清晰的等級制度（階級），從執行長到實習生。
It took several years for him to move up the social hierarchy in the city. 他花了幾年時間才在城市的社會階層中向上攀升。
The birds were flying high above the clouds. 鳥兒在雲層上方高高地飛翔。
The cost of living in this city is extremely high. 這座城市的物價非常高。

meaning: 使更高；增加金額或數量。
sentences: To higher means to make higher; to raise or increase in amount or quantity. 更高意味著更高；提高或增加金額或數量。
People may higher in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們在不同情況下可能會更高。

meaning: 高地面積；高於周圍地區的土地。
sentences: The highlands of the Swiss Alps are home to many unique flowers. 瑞士阿爾卑斯山的高地盛產許多獨特的花卉。
The term highland refers to a high area; land that is higher than surrounding areas. 高地一詞指的是高地；高於周圍地區的土地。
The manager used a highlighter to highlight the key points in the report. 經理用螢光筆強調了報告中的關鍵點。
The highlight of the trip was visiting the magnificent ancient temples in Kyoto. 旅行中最精彩的部分是參觀京都宏偉的古寺。
The professor is highly respected for his research in science. 這位教授因其在科學領域的研究而深受尊敬。
Regular physical exercise is highly recommended for all ages. 強烈建議所有年齡層的人都進行定期運動。
Traveling by highway is the fastest way to get to Taichung. 走高速公路是去台中最快的方式。
The new highway was built to reduce traffic congestion in the city. 新公路的建成是為了緩解城市的交通擁塞。
The terrorists threatened to hijack the plane if their demands were not met. 恐怖分子威脅說，如果他們的要求得不到滿足，就劫持飛機。
Someone tried to hijack the meeting and turn the discussion to their own goals. 有人試圖控制（劫持）會議，將討論轉向自己的目標。
We decided to go for a long hike in the mountains on Sunday. 我們決定週日去山裡進行一次長距離健行。
The price of gold experienced a sudden hike yesterday morning. 金價昨天早上經歷了突然的大幅上漲。

meaning: 很搞笑;引起極大的歡樂和笑聲。
sentences: Do you like Monty Python? I think they're hilarious. 你喜歡巨蟒劇團嗎？我覺得他們很搞笑。
The report describes the result as hilarious. 報告稱這結果很搞笑。

meaning: 以搞笑的方式；以便大大地逗樂。
sentences: a hilariously funny joke 一個非常搞笑的笑話
If someone acts hilariously, they do so in a way that is in a hilarious manner; so as to amuse greatly. 如果某人的行為很搞笑，那麼他們會以一種搞笑的方式這樣做；以便大為娛樂。
They took a pleasant walk up the grassy hill. 他們在長滿草的小山上愉快地散步。
Our house is located on the top of a small hill. 我們的房子位於一座小山丘的頂端。
The term hilltop refers to the peak or crest of a hill. 術語“山頂”是指山的頂峰或山頂。
The lesson introduced hilltop as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 Hilltop 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 山上資源豐富；有許多山丘。
sentences: Something described as hilly is abundant in hills; having many hills. 被形容為丘陵的東西在丘陵中是豐富的；有許多山丘。
The word hilly is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 丘陵一詞常用來形容人、事物或情況。
I saw him at the library this morning. 我今天早上在圖書館見到他了。
Give the message to him when he arrives. 他到的時候把消息傳給他。

meaning: 位於後部（最常說的動物身體部位）。
sentences: Something described as hind is located at the rear (most often said of animals' body parts). 被描述為「後部」的東西位於後部（最常說的是動物的身體部位）。
The word hind is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 後這個詞常用來形容人、事物或情況。
The bad weather hindered our progress on the project. 惡劣的天氣阻礙了我們專案的進展。
Don't let your fear hinder you from achieving your goals. 不要讓恐懼阻礙你實現目標。

meaning: 阻礙的事物：阻礙其他事物或導致其他事物出現問題的事物。
sentences: High-heeled shoes may be fashionable, but they can also be a hindrance to walking. 高跟鞋可能很時尚，但也可能成為行走的障礙。
The term hindrance refers to something which hinders: something that holds back or causes problems with something else. 障礙一詞指的是阻礙的事物：阻礙其他事物或導致其他事物出現問題的事物。

meaning: 事件發生後意識到或理解事件的意義和性質。
sentences: You know what they say, hindsight is twenty-twenty. 你知道他們說什麼，事後看來是二十二十。
In hindsight, I realize that I should have studied harder for the exam. 事後看來，我意識到我應該為考試更努力學習。

meaning: 隨後的推理或事件所依賴的原則或時間點。
sentences: This argument was the hinge on which the question turned. 這個論點是問題的關鍵。
The term hinge refers to a principle, or a point in time, on which subsequent reasonings or events depend. 鉸鏈一詞指的是後續推理或事件所依賴的原則或時間點。
Could you please give me a hint to help me solve the puzzle? 你能給我一點暗示，幫我解開這個謎題嗎？
There was a hint of sarcasm in her voice during the meeting. 她的語氣中帶有一絲諷刺。

meaning: 緊鄰海岸且位於海岸內陸的土地。
sentences: The term hinterland refers to The land immediately next to, and inland from, a coast. 腹地一詞是指緊鄰海岸且位於海岸內陸的土地。
We learned the meaning of hinterland during today's lesson. 今天的課我們學習了腹地的意義。
He hurt his hip while playing football and had to see a doctor. 他踢足球時弄傷了髖部，不得不去看醫生。
She wore a colorful silk scarf tied around her hips at the beach. 她在海灘上圍著一條鮮豔的絲巾。

meaning: 海馬迴。大腦中與記憶形成、學習和空間導航有關的重要區域。
sentences: The hippocampus helps the brain form and organize new memories. 海馬迴幫助大腦形成並整理新的記憶。
Damage to the hippocampus can make it difficult for a person to remember recent events. 海馬迴受損可能使人難以記住最近發生的事情。
Does the definition of 'hippopotamus/hippo' change depending on the context? 「hippopotamus/hippo」的定義會根據語境而改變嗎？
She wrote a fascinating article about the 'hippopotamus/hippo' of the future. 她寫了一篇關於未來「hippopotamus/hippo」的引人入勝的文章。
The company is planning to hire several new employees next month. 公司正計劃下個月雇用幾名新員工。
They decided to hire a professional consultant for the project. 他們決定為該專案聘請一位專業顧問。
He left his umbrella on the bus. 他把傘忘在了公車上。
I think that bag is his. 我肯定那個包包是他的。
He works as a professional historian at a leading university. 他在一家頂尖大學擔任專業歷史學家。
The historian provided a detailed account of the ancient events. 歷史學家對古代事件做了詳細的敘述。
The signing of the peace treaty was a truly historic event. 和平協議的簽署是一個真正的歷史性事件。
They decided to restore the historic building to its former glory. 他們決定修復這座歷史建築，恢復往日的榮光。
The city is a fascinating blend of ancient and historical architecture. 這座城市是古代與歷史建築的迷人融合。
The novel is based on historical events that happened in the 19th century. 這部小說是基於發生在 19 世紀的歷史事件。

meaning: 以歷史性的方式；參考歷史或歷史記錄。
sentences: Historically speaking, this company has always collected payment before starting work. 從歷史上看，這家公司一直都是先收款後開工。
Virtually all modern scholars of antiquity agree that Jesus existed historically. 幾乎所有現代古代學者都同意耶穌在歷史上存在過。
She is very interested in the history of ancient civilizations. 她對古代文明的歷史非常感興趣。
China has a long and rich history spanning thousands of years. 中國擁有跨越數千年的悠久豐富歷史。
He hit the ball hard and it flew over the fence. 他用力擊球，球飛過了圍欄。
The movie was a massive hit and won several awards. 這部電影大受歡迎，並贏得了多項獎項。

meaning: 移動時斷斷續續或停頓、猛拉或腳步；談到阻礙或阻礙的事情。
sentences: Frank’s breath hitched in his throat when he saw the knife being pointed at him. 當弗蘭克看到刀指著他時，他的呼吸都停止了。
To hitch means to move interruptedly or with halts, jerks, or steps; said of something obstructed or impeded. 搭便車意味著中斷地或停頓、猛拉或腳步移動；表示某事受到阻礙或妨礙。

meaning: 到了這個地方。在演講或寫作中：到目前為止；到目前為止。
sentences: If someone acts hitherto, they do so in a way that is up to this place. In speech or writing: up to this point; thus far. 如果有人迄今為止採取行動，他們的方式取決於這個地方。在演講或寫作中：到目前為止；到目前為止。
The speaker responded hitherto during the discussion. 發言者在討論中對此作出了回應。
The boxer was renowned as a hard hitter. 這位拳擊手以強力擊球手而聞名。
The term hitter refers to one who or that which hits. 擊球手一詞是指擊中的人或物體。
We could hear the constant buzz of bees from the nearby hive. 我們能聽到附近蜂巢傳來的持續嗡嗡聲。
The city center managing to be a busy hive of activity at night. 市中心在夜晚竟然（能）成了一個忙碌的活動中心（蜂巢）。
a hoard of provisions; a hoard of money 一堆糧食；一大堆錢
The term hoard refers to a hidden supply or fund. 囤積一詞是指隱藏的供應或資金。
His voice was hoarse from cheering for the team all afternoon. 由於整個下午都在為球隊加油，他的聲音變得很沙啞。
She had a bad cold and could only speak in a hoarse whisper. 她得了重感冒，只能用沙啞的低語說話。

meaning: 任何故意欺騙或欺騙的行為。
sentences: The phone call to the police about a tiger in a tree turned out to be a hoax. 關於樹上有老虎的報警電話結果證明是個騙局。
The news story about the pop singer coming to town, unfortunately for his fans, turned out to be a hoax. 關於這位流行歌手來到這座城市的新聞報道，對他的歌迷來說不幸的是，結果證明是一個騙局。
My favorite hobby is taking photos of nature. 我最喜歡的嗜好是拍攝自然風景。
Finding a hobby you enjoy can reduce stress and anxiety. 找到一個你喜歡的嗜好可以減輕壓力和焦慮。
Old-fashioned boots often had heavy metal hobnails on the soles. 老式靴子的鞋底常有厚重的金屬釘。
You could hear the sound of hobnails on the stone floor. 你可以聽到石地板上傳來的鞋底釘聲。

meaning: 成為流浪漢、流浪漢、流浪漢等。
sentences: Joe idly hoboed through half the country till he realized hoboing never gets you anywhere in life. 喬無所事事地流浪了半個國家，直到他意識到流浪永遠不會讓你在生活中取得任何成就。
To hobo means to be a hobo, tramp, bum etc. 流浪漢的意思是流浪漢、流浪漢、流浪漢等。
The horse suffered an injury to its left hock. 這匹馬的左跗關節受傷了。
He had to hock his watch to pay his rent. 他不得不典當他的手錶來付房租。
Ice hockey is a very popular sport in Canada and northern parts of the US. 冰上曲棍球在加拿大和美國北部是非常受歡迎的運動。
He plays for the local field hockey team and practices three times a week. 他效力於當地的陸上曲棍球隊，每週訓練三次。
The gardener used a hoe to remove the weeds from the flower bed. 園丁用鋤頭清除了花壇裡的雜草。
He spent the morning hoeing the rows of vegetables. 他上午都在為成排的蔬菜鋤地。
They used a crane to hoist the heavy equipment onto the roof. 他們使用起重機將重型設備吊到屋頂上。
The flag was hoisted to mark the beginning of the ceremony. 旗幟升起，標誌著典禮的開始。
Please hold the ladder steady while I climb up. 我爬上去時請扶穩梯子。
She was holding a bouquet of fresh flowers in her hands. 她手裡拿著一束鮮花。
He is the proud holder of a world record in swimming. 他是游泳世界紀錄的自豪保持者。
Please place your cup in the cup holder provided in the car. 請將您的杯子放在車內提供的杯架上。

meaning: 由法院作出的法律裁決。
sentences: The term holding refers to A determination of law made by a court. 術語“持有”是指法院做出的法律裁決。
We learned the meaning of holding during today's lesson. 今天的課程我們學習了持有的意義。
The little rabbit was hiding in a small hole in the ground. 小兔子正躲在地上的一個小洞裡。
There is a small hole in your shirt; you should get it fixed. 你襯衫上有個小洞；你應該把它補好。
We are going to Italy for our summer holiday this year. 我們今年暑假要去義大利度假。
Tomorrow is a public holiday, so all the banks will be closed. 明天是公眾假期，所以所有銀行都會關門。

meaning: 涉及整體研究而不是分解成部分。
sentences: Something described as holistic is relating to a study of the whole instead of a separation into parts. 所謂整體性的東西是指對整體的研究，而不是對部分的分離。
The word holistic is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 整體這個詞常用來描述一個人、事物或情況。
I heard a holler from over the fence. 我聽到柵欄那邊傳來一聲叫喊。
The term holler refers to A yell, shout. 喊叫一詞指的是喊叫、喊叫。
The old oak tree has a hollow trunk where owls like to nest. 老橡樹有一個空心的樹幹，貓頭鷹喜歡在那裡築巢。
His promises manage to feel hollow because he never keeps them. 他的承諾感覺很空洞，因為他從不遵守。

meaning: 冬青屬的各種灌木或（大部分）小樹，常綠或落葉，特別在聖誕節用作裝飾。
sentences: The term holly refers to any of various shrubs or (mostly) small trees, of the genus Ilex, either evergreen or deciduous, used as decoration especially at Christmas. 冬青一詞指的是冬青屬的任何各種灌木或（大部分）小樹，常綠或落葉，尤其在聖誕節用作裝飾。
The lesson introduced holly as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了冬青這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 對一群動物或人的大規模破壞；大規模的屠殺或屠殺。
sentences: a nuclear holocaust 核子浩劫
The term holocaust refers to extensive destruction of a group of animals or people; a large-scale massacre or slaughter. 「大屠殺」一詞是指對一群動物或人類的大規模破壞；大規模的屠殺或屠殺。
a holographic will or testament 全息遺囑或遺囑
Something described as holographic is handwritten by a single writer. 被描述為全息的東西是由一位作家手寫的。
The police officer kept his gun in a leather holster. 警察將槍放在皮革槍套裡。
He reached for his holster when he heard the strange noise. 聽到奇怪的響聲時，他伸手摸向槍套。

meaning: 一小片林地或樹木繁茂的小山；一片小樹林。
sentences: The term holt refers to a small piece of woodland or a woody hill; a copse. 「holt」一詞指的是一小片林地或樹木繁茂的山丘；一片小樹林。
The lesson introduced holt as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 holt 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
Jerusalem is considered a holy city by several major religions. 耶路撒冷被幾個主要宗教視為聖城。
They spent the afternoon exploring the ancient and holy temple. 他們下午探索了那座古老神聖的寺廟。

meaning: 對退休或過世後的人表示尊重。
sentences: The term homage refers to a demonstration of respect, as towards a person after his or her retirement or death. 敬意一詞是指對一個人退休或去世後表示的尊重。
The lesson introduced homage as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了敬意作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
I'm so tired that I just want to go home and rest. 我太累了，只想回家休息。
Taiwan is my home, and I love living here. 台灣是我的家，我喜歡住在這。
Many people dream of returning to their homeland after retiring. 許多人夢想退休後回到祖國（家園）。
The soldiers were proud to defend their homeland from the enemy. 士兵們為能保衛家園抵禦敵人感到自豪。
The charity provides food and shelter for the homeless. 該慈善機構為無家可歸者提供食物和住所。
The number of homeless people in the city has increased lately. 市內無家可歸者的人數最近有所增加。

meaning: 風格簡約，彷彿在家製作。
sentences: a homemade aphorism 自製的格言
Something described as homemade is in a simple style as if made at home. 所謂自製的東西是指風格簡單，就像在家裡製作的一樣。
The term homeowner refers to someone who owns a house. 房主一詞是指擁有房屋的人。
The lesson introduced homeowner as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「房主」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The Sultan of Swat homered 714 times. 斯瓦特蘇丹擊出 714 支全壘打。
To homer means to hit a homer; to hit a home run. To homer 的意思是击出本垒打；打出全垒打。
I felt very homesick when I first moved abroad to study. 當我剛搬到國外唸書時，感到非常想家。
She listens to traditional music from her hometown when she feels homesick. 想家時，她會聽家鄉的傳統音樂。

meaning: 家庭的住所或所在地；原產地。
sentences: The term homestead refers to the home or seat of a family; place of origin. 宅基地一詞是指一個家庭的住所或所在地；產地。
The lesson introduced homestead as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了宅基地作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
What is your hometown? I'm from a small village in the south. 你家鄉在哪裡？我來自南部的一個小村莊。
He decided to move back to his hometown after retiring from work. 他決定退休後搬回老家。
Have you finished your math homework yet? 你做完數學功課了嗎？
Our teacher gives us a lot of homework every weekend. 我們的老師每個週末都給我們很多作業。

meaning: 適合一個家； 舒適 ， 親密 。
sentences: Susan added some homey touches to her office. 蘇珊為她的辦公室增添了一些 溫馨 的氣息。 蘇珊為她的辦公室增添了一些溫馨的感覺。 蘇珊為她的辦公室增添了一些溫馨的氛圍。
The report describes the result as homey. 報告稱這項結果很溫馨。 報告稱這項結果很溫馨。 報告稱這項結果很受歡迎。

meaning: 兇殺案的受害者；被他人非法殺害的人。
sentences: The term homicide refers to a victim of homicide; a person who has been unlawfully killed by someone else. 兇殺一詞是指兇殺的受害者；被他人非法殺害的人。
The lesson introduced homicide as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了兇殺這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 均質化；幾乎總是提到乳脂含量高的牛奶。
sentences: Something described as homo is homogenized; almost always said of milk with a high butterfat content. 被描述為同質的東西是同質化的；幾乎總是提到乳脂含量高的牛奶。
The word homo is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「homo」這個字常用來形容一個人、一件事或一種情況。
The organization works to protect the rights of homosexual individuals. 該組織致力於保護同性戀者的權利。
Many countries have recently recognized the legality of homosexual marriage. 許多國家最近已經承認了同性婚姻的合法性。

meaning: 套索或套索一端的閉環或孔眼，繩索的另一端穿過該閉環或孔眼以形成更大的環。
sentences: The term honda refers to a closed loop or eyelet at one end of a lariat or lasso, through which the other end of the rope is passed to form a much larger loop. 本田一詞指的是套索或套索一端的閉環或孔眼，繩索的另一端穿過該閉環或孔眼以形成更大的環。
The lesson introduced honda as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了本田這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
He spent years honing his skills as a professional chef. 他花了多年時間磨練自己作為專業廚師的技能。
You should hone the blade regularly to keep it sharp. 你應該定期磨刀刃以保持其銳利。
To be honest, I don't really like the taste of this dish. 老實說，我不太喜歡這道菜的味道。
She is a very honest person who always tells the truth. 她是一個非常誠實的人，總是說實話。
Honestly! I want to finish this work and you keep interrupting. 誠實地！我想完成這項工作，你卻不斷打擾。
The word honestly is used in English writing and speech. 「誠實」這個詞用於英語寫作和演講。
Honesty is always the best policy in both life and business. 誠實始終是生活與商務中的最佳策略。
I really appreciate your honesty and openness about the issue. 我非常感激你對該問題的誠實與坦率。
I like to put some honey and lemon in my hot tea. 我喜歡在熱茶裡加一些蜂蜜和檸檬。
Honey is a natural sweetener produced by bees. 蜂蜜是蜜蜂生產的一種天然甜味劑。

meaning: 在（某物）內部鑽洞或隧道。
sentences: Termites will honeycomb a porch made of untreated pine. 白蟻會在未經處理的松木製成的門廊上形成蜂巢狀。
People often honeycomb when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會蜂擁而至。
Honeydew is a sweet and refreshing variety of melon. 蜜瓜是一種甜美清爽的甜瓜品種。
We had a fruit salad with chunks of fresh honeydew. 我們吃了一份帶有新鮮蜜瓜塊的水果沙拉。
The young couple decided to spend their honeymoon in Italy now. 這對年輕情侶現在決定在義大利度過他們的蜜月。
The project's honeymoon period managing to be over very quickly. 專案的磨合（蜜月）期竟然很快就結束了。
They stood and observed how long it took for the other cars to honk. 他們站著觀察其他汽車鳴喇叭需要多長時間。
People often honk when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們經常按喇叭。
It was a great honor to meet the famous author in person. 能親自見到那位著名作家是我莫大的榮幸。
The school held a ceremony to honor its top-performing students. 學校舉行典禮以表彰成績優異的學生。
He is an honorable man who always keeps his word and treats others with respect. 他是一個正直的人，總是守信用，並尊重他人。
After several years of honorable service, he was promoted to senior manager. 在多年忠誠且可敬的服務後，他被晉升為高級經理。
The university awarded him an honorary degree for his contribution to art. 大學因他對藝術的貢獻授予他榮譽學位。
She serves as an honorary member of the board of directors. 她擔任董事會的名譽成員。
